perks.name: Slayer XP Buff
perks.description: Earn %{VALUE:SLAYER_XP} more Slayer XP.

perks.name: Pathfinder
perks.description: Gain rare drops %{VALUE:RARE_DROPS} more often.

perks.name: SLASHED Pricing
perks.description: Starting slayer quests is half price.

perks.name: Mining Fiesta
perks.description:
Schedules %{VALUE:MINING_FIESTA_COUNT} %{KEYWORD:MINING_FIESTA} events that last for %{VALUE:DURATION} SkyBlock Days each. Earn %{VALUE:MORE_DROPS} drops and extra %{KEYWORD:UNIQUE_LOOT}, including %{KEYWORD:REFINED_MINERALS} and %{KEYWORD:GLOSSY_GEMSTONES}.
Grants %{VALUE:MINING_WISDOM} %{STAT:MINING_WISDOM} during the event which is only active on Public Islands.

perks.name: Mining XP Buff
perks.description: Earn %{VALUE:MINING_WISDOM} %{STAT:MINING_WISDOM} on public islands.

perks.name: Molten Forge
perks.description: Decreases the time it takes to Forge items by %{VALUE:FORGE_TIME}.

perks.name: Prospection
perks.description: Mining minions work %{VALUE:MINING_MINION_SPEED} faster.

perks.name: Pet XP Buff
perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:PET_XP} more Pet XP.

perks.name: Lucky!
perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:PET_LUCK} %{STAT:PET_LUCK}.

perks.name: Mythological Ritual
perks.description: Mayor Diana will sell the Griffin Pet, which lets you find %{KEYWORD:MYTHOLOGICAL_CREATURE} and tons of %{KEYWORDS:UNIQUE_ITEMS}.

perks.name: Sharing is Caring
perks.description: You can have up to %{VALUE:EXP_SHARE_COUNT} EXP Shared Pets active at once. Your EXP Share rate is increased by %{VALUE:EXP_SHARE_RATE}.

perks.name: Long Term Investment
perks.description: The elected Minister will appear in the next Election with all of their available perks.

perks.name: Shopping Spree
perks.description: Increase daily NPC limits by %{VALUE:NPC_LIMIT}.

perks.name: Stock Exchange
perks.description: Participate in the Stonks Auction for a chance to win Stock of Stonks! Trade them for %{KEYWORDS:EXTRAVAGANT_ITEM} at the Trade Center.

perks.name: Volume Trading
perks.description: Double the item quantity from Shen's Auction, Shen's Special, and Rift Shen's on the year Diaz is elected. Two additional Shen's Special auctions will be available for the duration of Diaz being elected as Mayor.

perks.name: Blooming Business
perks.description:
Garden Visitors will give out Fine Flour and appear more often. Additional visitors may visit your Garden.
High rarity Visitors are more likely to show up & will provide %{VALUE:MORE_COPPER} more Copper.

perks.name: GOATed
perks.description: %{KEYWORD:JACOBS_CONTEST} brackets include up to %{VALUE:MORE_PLAYERS} more players each.

perks.name: Pelt-pocalypse
perks.description: Obtain %{VALUE:MORE_PELTS} more %{KEYWORDS:PELT} from Trevor in the %{ZONE:MUSHROOM_DESERT}, hunt a new Trapper Mob, and purchase items from a new Trapper Shop.

perks.name: Pest Eradicator
perks.description:
The duration of Pesthunter Phillip's %{STAT:FARMING_FORTUNE} bonus is now %{VALUE:DURATION} minutes.
Pests are now %{VALUE:SPAWN_CHANCE} more likely to spawn in sprayed plots.

perks.name: A Time for Giving
perks.description: Party Chests and Party Gifts can be obtained while this event is active.

perks.name: Chivalrous Carnival
perks.description: Schedules a Carnival in the Hub that is active throughout the entire year.

perks.name: Extra Event
perks.description: Schedules an extra %{FORMAT:GOLD}{EVENT_NAME} %{FORMAT:GRAY}event during the year.

perks.name: Sweet Benevolence
perks.description: Earn %{VALUE:MORE_STUFF} more Candy, Gifts and Chocolate from duplicate Rabbits during their respective events.

perks.name: Double Trouble
perks.description: For every %{VALUE:EVERY_SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE} %{STAT:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE}, gain %{VALUE:GAIN_DOUBLE_HOOK_CHANCE} %{STAT:DOUBLE_HOOK_CHANCE}.

perks.name: Fishing XP Buff
perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:FISHING_WISDOM} %{STAT:FISHING_WISDOM} on public islands.

perks.name: Fishing Festival
perks.description:
Start a special fishing event during the first %{VALUE:DAYS} days of each month!
Fish and fight dangerous sharks and earn unique Shark loot.

perks.name: Luck of the Sea 2.0
perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE} %{STAT:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE}.

perks.name: Benediction
perks.description: Blessings are %{VALUE:BLESSING_SCALAR} stronger.

perks.name: Marauder
perks.description: Dungeon reward chests are %{VALUE:CHEST_COST} cheaper.

perks.name: EZPZ
perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:BONUS_SCORE} bonus score on dungeon runs.

perks.name: Perkpocalypse
perks.description: Activate all perks of another Mayor every %{VALUE:ROTATION} SkyBlock days (6 hours).

perks.name: Statspocalypse
perks.description: Increases all %{STAT_CATEGORY:COMBAT} and %{STAT_CATEGORY:MISCELLANEOUS} stats by %{VALUE:STATS_BUFF}.

perks.name: Jerrypocalypse
perks.description: Reveal Hidden Jerries from logging, farming, mining and killing mobs.

perks.name: QUAD TAXES!!!
perks.description: Pay %{VALUE:TAX_AMOUNT} the normal amount of taxes!

perks.name: TURBO MINIONS!!!
perks.description: Minions have double the output!

perks.name: DOUBLE MOBS HP!!!
perks.description: ALL monsters have double %{STAT:HEALTH}!

perks.name: MOAR SKILLZ!!!
perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:SKILL_EXP} more skill experience!

perks.name: Bribe
perks.description: If Scorpius wins and you voted for him, Mayor Scorpius will offer you %{KEYWORDS:COIN} as a token of gratitude.

perks.name: Darker Auctions
perks.description: Scorpius will intrude in Dark Auctions increasing the amount of rounds to %{VALUE:ROUNDS} and offering special items.
